title: Wendia schelkovnikowii
taxonomy: Wendia schelkovnikowii is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to Russia. The plant's classification is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Lamiales, Family: Acanthaceae, Genus: Wendia, Species: W. schelkovnikowii.
